top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Says Iran Deal to Be Signed Tomorrow or Friday
top_signals.summary: "The deal we reached with Iran on Sunday will be signed shortly, tomorrow, maybe the next day,” President Donald Trump said during a press conference at the G7 summit in France.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Gears Up to Boost Oil Exports
top_signals.summary: While U.S. President Donald Trump has recently hailed the resumption of oil flows from Gulf allies, Iran, too, appears to be gearing up to resume exports and trading.At least three tankers carrying some five million barrels of Iranian oil have sailed through the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he likes idea of blaming Vance if Iran deal doesn't work out
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The price of trust: How a cargo theft changed one shipper
top_signals.summary:
After criminals allegedly hijacked a Walmart-bound shipment, Global Protection discovered that legitimate carriers, drivers and paperwork are not always enough. The company explains how the incident changed its approach to verification and why slowing down became part of its security strategy.

The post The price of trust: How a cargo theft changed one shipper appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Operar día y noche: el cambio cultural que se aproxima a Wall Street
top_signals.summary: Las entidades financieras tradicionales están empezando a evaluar modelos de negociación ininterrumpida de diversos activos, de una forma que lleva años revolucionando los horarios en el sector cripto.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Revives Risky Loan Deals That Banks Couldn’t Sell
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks are looking to make the most of rising demand for risky debt with a raft of leveraged loan sales that they previously couldn’t sell.

top_signals.title: Brazilian Nickel Seeks Anchor Investor for $1.4 Billion Mine
top_signals.summary: Brazilian Nickel Ltd. is seeking an anchor investor to help attract more equity funding for its planned $1.4 billion nickel and cobalt mine in northeastern Brazil.

top_signals.title: Starmer holds out prospect of cabinet job for Burnham
top_signals.summary: Allies of mayor say he would turn down such a role as he is pitching himself as a change from current administration

top_signals.title: Trump, Modi Discuss Seafarer Safety in Gulf Region
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday he had held a "very good" conversation with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi during the G7 summit in France and that their two countries were working on trade deals.Trump called Modi a "tough negotiator…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
